title: dyssodia neomexicana
intro: Dyssodia neomexicana, also known as New Mexico bone-set, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dyssodia neomexicana include its ability to treat pain and reduce inflammation, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis and injuries. Dyssodia neomexicana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and ointments to treat skin conditions and wounds.
